understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the character to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue completing subsequent levels until the game is won, using no more than 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT; after any horizontal move, gravity would automatically carry the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/safe tile, reaching the `+` goal, or landing on a hazard (spikes `u`/`v`) which immediately ends the attempt. CLICK could be used on specific grid coordinates to interact with clickable tiles—primarily removing breakable blocks `x` to open a fall path—and CLICKs did not consume platform-timer moves when a rising platform mechanic was present. UNDO would revert the previous action to recover from a mistaken move/click. Safe landing/support tiles included `o`, `m`, and `w`, and planning should use the provided landing previews/corridor scan to avoid spikes and prioritize passage columns that change vertical section.
